title: crepis pusilla
intro: Crepis pusilla, also known as Small Hawk's Beard or Dwarf Hawksbeard, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crepis pusilla include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Crepis pusilla is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
